notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an open battle scene (龙公 vs 劫运坛, 北原诸仙 vs 天庭蛊仙) with mostly visible combat events. No private knowledge, secret plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present. The entities' internal motives/plans are not narrated from the source; only visible actions are described. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculation or merging.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes combat actions (龙公 attacking 劫运坛, 北原诸仙 vs 天庭蛊仙) and reactions (袁琼都昏死, 冰塞川震惊). Characters' observed behaviors are mostly combat responses under duress. No clear observed motive (beyond 'fighting the enemy') is directly supported by seed facts without psychological leaps. Motive would be speculative.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains individual actors (天庭蛊仙, 北原蛊仙) but no named collective faction/group with a concrete stake. '天庭' and '北原诸仙' appear as collective labels in events but are too broad as faction labels without specific named faction organization stakes. '劫运坛' is a仙蛊屋 (immortal gu house), not a faction/group. '长生天' is implied via context (ptr_13, ptr_14) but not explicitly named as a faction in the seed entities/relations. No named family, clan, shop, hall, or organization with clear collective stake is present. Individual persons (龙公, 冰塞川, 牛魔, etc.) have stakes but are not tied to a named collective actor in the seed data.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
